title: Xian Ni
titleNative: 仙逆
synopsis: Saints, the most formidable beings under the heaven. Follow Tie Zhu as he entered one of the elite sects: Heng Yue Sect and work his way toward to become a saint. (Source: OSTNT)

title: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
titleRomaji: Danjo no Yuujou wa Seiritsu suru? (Iya, Shinai!!)
titleNative: 男女の友情は成立する？（いや、しないっ!!）
synopsis: Himari Inuzuka, a cheerful girl who's never been in love, and Yuu Natsume, a flower-loving boy, became friends by chance. Two years later, the two are still best friends. But when Yuu is reunited with his former crush, the relationship between Himari and Yuu began to change......? (Source: Dengeki Daioh, translated)

title: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleRomaji: Isekai Nidome no Ossan, Dou Kangaete mo Koukousei Yuusha yori Tsuyoi
titleEnglish: Second Time in Another World, This Old Man Is WAY Stronger Than the High School Heroes!
titleNative: 異世界二度目のおっさん、どう考えても高校生勇者より強い
synonyms: The Old Man in His Second Time in Another World Is Somehow Stronger than the High School Hero
synopsis: Riku Takayanagi is a boring 32-year-old businessman with nothing special about him. Or so it seems. In truth, he once saved another world as a hero. Now he’s back in Japan, living a normal life… until one day, he’s dragged into the mess with three high school students and summoned again—this time to a different world?! Suddenly thrust into the unknown, Riku steadies the panicked teen heroes, encourages them, and teaches them how to survive. The long-awaited opening to a second-chance another-world adventure—starring a caring, absurdly overpowered old man hero! (Source: Alpha Manga)

title: 17-sai Kara Yarinaosu Propose
titleNative: 17歳からやり直すプロポーズ
synopsis: "If only I had met you when we were in high school…" Osamu’s girlfriend refused his proposal with these mysterious words. And then after an accident, he time-leaps back to his high school days. He tries to find her and make her fall in love with him again, but when he meets her, he finds out that she has a twin sister…!? (Source: Comic Trail, translated)

synonyms: Marriage proposal to start from 17 years old.

title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: Futago Matomete "Kanojo" ni Shinai?
titleNative: 双子まとめて『カノジョ』にしない？
synopsis: Chikage is a beautiful girl in my class who is smart and well-behaved. She is my rival in school, but after school, she has another face. After school, she plays in the arcade with an innocent smile that would be unimaginable in class. I try to make friends with Chikage on campus and play with her after school in order to get to know her better at both places. We grow closer to each other, until finally… a heartwarming triangular love comedy begins! (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

titleRomaji: Ane no Koto ga Sukina Hittou Majutsushi-sama ni Migawari de Totsuidara, Naze ka Watashi ga Dekiai saremashita!?: Munou Reijou wa Kuni Ichiban no Kekkai Majutsushi ni Kaika suru
titleNative: 姉のことが好きな筆頭魔術師様に身代わりで嫁いだら、なぜか私が溺愛されました！？～無能令嬢は国一番の結界魔術師に開花する～

title: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleRomaji: Netoge Haijin no Isekai Tenseiki: Ken Ou to Yobareta Saikyou no Kobunshi ga Tsukenai node, 1-nichi 8-jikan Konbou wo Furu Koto kara Hajimeta
titleEnglish: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleNative: ネトゲ廃人の異世界転生記 拳王とよばれた最強の拳が使えないので、1日8時間こん棒を振ることからはじめた
synopsis: Kazuya finally became the strongest player in the VRMMORPG he devoted his life to and gained the title "Fist King." Just as he became number one, he was reborn in another world like the game, where monsters roam free! In this new world where firearms are favored over melee weapons, Kazuya takes up a club to once again pursue his ideal strength! (Source: MangaPlaza)
chapterSourceTitle: Senchi Kara Kaette kita Takashi-kun. Futsuu ni Koukou Seikatsu wo Okuritai

title: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleRomaji: Ringoku kara Kita Yome ga Kawaisugite Doushiyou.
titleNative: 隣国から来た嫁が可愛すぎてどうしよう。
synonyms: My Wife from the Neighboring Country Is So Cute, I Don't Know What to Do!
鄰國來的新娘太可愛了該怎麼辦？
synopsis: With his brash personality and muscular physique, and his fierce presence fighting against his country's foes, Salyu is known as the “Winter Bear of Tidros." Until one day when he finds himself engaged to Citron, a young lady whose betrothal was broken off in a neighboring country! Starting with a kiss on the forehead, he fidgets awkwardly around this unfamiliar woman. Her smile makes his heart race, and glimpses of her cleavage leave him flustered. Salyu's mind runs wild with naughty thoughts, pushing his sanity to the brink! This chaotic, heart-pounding romantic fantasy comedy begins — with his inner thoughts coming through loud and clear! (Source: Comic Pash, translated)

title: Denpa Kyoushi
titleNative: 電波教師
synopsis: Kagami Junichirou was known as a physics genius when he was a teenager, and he was even published in "Nature." However, after college, he suddenly lost all interest in science. As a NEET, he's devoted himself to his anime blog and nerdy collecting habits. He claims he has a serious illness called "I can't do anything I don't want to do." Desperate to get him to do something with his life, his little sister manages to get him a job teaching physics at his old high school. He's certainly an unconventional teacher, but he becomes fairly popular with the students. After helping a girl who's being ruthlessly bullied, Kagami finds that he actually likes teaching. Will he continue his career as a weird teacher? Will he go back into physics? Or will he end up back where he started? (Source: MangaHelpers)

title: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai!
titleNative: みことちゃんは嫌われたくない!
synopsis: My beautiful, big-breasted childhood friend, Mikoto, is completely in love with me. It sounds like a dream scenario that anyone would envy — but there’s just one big problem... She’s turned into a clingy, mentally unstable mess with love that's way too heavy!! This is a dark everyday comedy about being at the mercy of Mikoto’s unstable behavior and unintentional sexiness. Note: Mikoto-chan wa Kirawaretakunai! began as a web manga shared on the author's Twitter starting February 15, 2023, and has been published in print by Kadokawa since January 18, 2024.

title: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onna Shishoutachi ga Ikusei Houshin wo Megutte Shuraba
titleEnglish: Training Regimes of the World’s Strongest Women
titleNative: 最強女師匠たちが育成方針を巡って修羅場
synonyms: The Strongest Female Masters Are Warring Over Training Policy
synopsis: “These three could destroy the country all by themselves if they wanted… But there was one thing they just couldn't get.” For the three strongest adventurers in the world, finding a man strong enough to be with them is a herculean task. He simply doesn’t exist. With that in mind, they decide to take on a perfect novice—the level-zero, unremarkable Cross Alacart—and train him up to be their perfect match. Freshly expelled from Adventurers’ school, Cross sets his eyes on redemption; training hard and learning to believe in himself along the way. (Source: Comikey)

title: Mia is Back
titleNative: 미아가 돌아왔다
synopsis: Mi-A was Tae-Su's first love, who suddenly disappeared one day. After five years of silence, she reappears as a freshman at his university. But she's not the girl he remembers. He plays it cool, trying to ignore her, but can first love truly be forgotten? Or w

title: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: Anta to Osananajimitte dake demo Iyananoni!: Zekkou kara Hajimaru S-kyuu Bishoujo to no Gakuen Nariagari Seikatsu
titleRomaji: Anta to Osananajimitte dake demo Iyananoni!: Zekkou kara Hajimaru S-kyuu Bishoujo to no Gakuen Nariagari Seikatsu
titleNative: アンタと幼なじみってだけでもイヤなのに！～絶交から始まるS級美少女との学園成り上がり生活～
synonyms: S-kyuu Gakuen no Jishou "Futsuu", Kawaisugiru Kanojotachi ni Guigui Kitararete Barebare desu.
S級学園の自称「普通」、可愛すぎる彼女たちにグイグイ来られてバレバレです。
I Hate That We're Childhood Friends!: My Rise to the Top of School Life with an S-Rank Beauty Begins After a Falling Out
synopsis: Kazuma Suzuki was just your average high schooler—until his childhood friend, Rua Takayashiki, a beautiful, sharp-tongued girl who also happened to be the granddaughter of the school chairman and the nation’s top idol, cut all ties with him using a line straight out of a drama. Forced into submission for years as her so-called childhood friend, Kazuma decides it’s finally time for his first-ever rebellion. He’s done playing lapdog. This time, he’s taking back his freedom—and aiming for a normal school life. Escaping a powerful beauty like her is easier said than done... (Source: Square Enix)

title: Puniru is a Kawaii Slime
titleNative: ぷにるはかわいいスライム
synopsis: Kotaro is an average young boy, and like many kids his age, he enjoys the latest childhood craze of playing with slime. One day, the slime randomly turns into an adorable girl who he names Puniru. Though cute, her stubbornness and constant need for attention get on his nerves. It’s like having a goopy little sister! Just when the two settle into their not-so-normal life, the granddaughter of Kyuthi Land’s founder arrives. Can Okanega Alice and her little friend Runrune out-cute the world’s most adorable slime girl?! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Kumagurashi
titleNative: くまぐらし
synopsis: Kumada is an office worker who lives his life by avoiding all kinds of risks: "If you're prepared, there's no need to worry.'' "Better safe than sorry'' "A gentleman does not approach danger." One day, a bear suddenly appears in his house as he is enjoying his bachelor lifestyle. It's also a mysterious bear who does housework...!?

tags.name: Animals

title: Battle Studies
titleNative: バトルスタディーズ
synopsis: You can't win through only with "friendship" and "youth." We stake our lives to get to the Koshien!! Kanou Shoutarou entered an official baseball club at one of the best powerhouse baseball schools in the country - DL Gakuen. However the discipline in the club, he admired so much, was beyond all imagination! From Nakibokuro—the former member of PL Gakuen's baseball club who played at the Koshien as the regular!

latestChapterTitle: No Man Better With No Outs

title: Fuuto Tantei
titleNative: 風都探偵
synopsis: In the ecologically-minded city of Fuuto, mysterious devices resembling USB flash drives called Gaia Memories are used by criminals and other interested parties to become monsters called Dopants, committing crimes with the police force powerless to stop them. To make matters worse, the Gaia Memories carry a dangerous toxin that cause their users to go insane to the point where they could die from the life-threatening devices. After the death of his boss, the self-proclaimed hard-boiled detective Shoutarou Hidari works with the mysterious Philip to investigate crimes which involve Dopants. Using their own Gaia Memories, Shoutarou and Philip use the Double Driver belts to transform and combine into Kamen Rider Double to fight the Dopant menace and keep Fuuto safe. (Source: Kamen Rider W Wiki) Note: Fuuto Tantei is a manga adaptation and sequel of the 2009 drama TV series Kamen Rider W .

title: Brenny-wa Binjari
titleNative: 브린니와 빈자리
synopsis: The story of a possessed person in a book who will not hesitate to kill for her goal. Brinny, who lived in obedience to her stepfather, thought it had nothing to do with her. Until she got involved in an incident with the sickly second prince, Lucian. At a moment of crisis, Brinny used her supernatural powers to save Lucian, and was relieved that everything was resolved when she saw that the possessed person, 'Aridna', was captured. However, for some reason, her beloved sister and the first prince died in a carriage accident, and even Lucian, who became her fiancé, began to act strangely. Wasn't the possessed person executed in the past? Is 'Aridna' still alive? Brinny decides to reclaim the empty space left by the disappearance of her precious people. She will fight the possessed person. (Source: Kakaopage, translated)
